Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Sorry for surprising you. I had a feeling someone was in here, so I came to check...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}He made a habit of not leaving behind any personal belongings, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...I have no idea when he filled out this form to return to school, or whether he even planned to hand it in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But, I think this is proof that he was thinking about the promise we made.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_006_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I may have bothered him about it.

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Yes... He was so against it, and yet he still left this for us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Right... Maybe it's wishful thinking, but I'd like to believe he was.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I never knew his situation, and it's possible I just made things worse for him, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...I think if he knew we felt guilty, he'd just tell us to mind our own business.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Maybe I shouldn't. He probably wouldn't approve.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Let's just keep this between us for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Hah... It sounds like you know how to handle those two now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Hah, I couldn't agree more. Sometimes, having so many stubborn teammates gives me a headache.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...Thanks to you, I was able to understand how he really felt.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'll say this on behalf of all three of us: Thank you so much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It should go to you, since you're the one who got him to open up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Someday, once we leave this dorm... then I'll tell Akihiko.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'll tell him about his struggle returning to this room, to fulfill the promise we made...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}That he never forgot those days when it was just the three of us... Not even for a moment...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: *Unused message labels. [n]*If it appears, it's a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You have witnessed Aragaki's final wishes. You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Hell Biker{f 0 1 27}, the hooligan of the underworld![n]{f 1 1}
